name: Elmer College | (Large Context Size)
description:
Welcome to Elmer College! A school full of Furries and the stray Human! Maybe it's your first day, or maybe you've been here for years, that's up for you to decide!


everyone is at least 18 years of age.

This is very much a sort of sandbox experience with essentially no defined story, the intro message is pretty much just a fill in the blanks, I recommend just filling out who you are in the chat memory and then starting wherever you wanna start. Or you can just sort of ask the bot to place you wherever.

I will NO LONGER be updating this bot, head over to the Lite Version from now on if you'd like a bot with new characters, areas, etc as time goes onward.
(Click here)

Everyone is here, (basically).

Yes everyone. So that means... a lot of characters.

And a massive token count.

Each character is listed here. Just remember, y'all asked for this lmao.
